metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1703
metadata.comment:
Rationale: The authors treat rat brain synaptosomes with GTPgammaS preventing the budding of clathrin coated vesicles. By EM (Figures 2c-j) dynamin is seen to coat the necks of the clathrin-coated pits. In figure 2a/b the author use conventional light microscopy to show dynamin 1 in presynaptic terminals.

17/11/2017 Pim
- I have removed the 'extrinsic component of ...' element of the selected term because the mode of membrane interaction was not addressed in the presented data.. Experimental description: Legend to figure 1, "Membrane fractions....were prepared from rat brain homogenates".
